59.reason: [The condition is incorrect. It should be strcmp(w, p->word) > 0 to continue searching, and break when strcmp < 0 to maintain lexicographic order. The current logic breaks on any mismatch, causing incorrect insertion position.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition is incorrect. It should be strcmp(w, p->word) > 0 to continue searching, and break when strcmp < 0 to maintain lexicographic order. The current logic breaks on any mismatch, causing incorrect insertion position.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: The condition should be `strcmp(w, p->word) < 0` to maintain lexicographic order. Using `!= 0` breaks out of the loop incorrectly when words are not equal, instead of continuing to find the correct insertion point.]
